name: @galerinaa/framework-app-kernel
description: Optional Galerina secure App Kernel: the fixed, non-bypassable governed request pipeline + secure-default route policy resolver. The fusion host for protocol/capability packages.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:fixtures: node ../galerina-core/compiler/galerina.js run tests/hello-world.spore && node ../galerina-core/compiler/galerina.js run tests/vector-function.spore && node ../galerina-core/compiler/galerina.js run tests/sum.spore && node ../galerina-core/compiler/galerina.js run tests/decimal-sum.spore && node ../galerina-core/compiler/galerina.js run tests/json-return.spore
